Source URL: https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance/find?type=26&zip=77084


# SBDC BOSS Resource Pack Manifest

Review date: 2026-06-26
Primary source reviewed: https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance/find?type=26&zip=77084
Primary geography: Houston / Harris County / example ZIP 77084.
Primary local SBDC network reviewed: University of Houston Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Network.

## File count
124 markdown files are included in this pack, including this manifest.

## Pack purpose
This pack is formatted for ingestion into the BOSS Library. Each markdown file begins with `Source URL:` on line one so the BOSS AI Librarian can provide the official link to users.

## Routing principles used
- Discover -> Diagnose -> Classify -> Route -> Recommend Next Action.
- Route SBDC when the user needs local market knowledge, structured business planning, financial projections, local ecosystem navigation, market research, funding readiness, government procurement readiness, international trade support, technology commercialization support, cybersecurity, disaster preparedness, or hands-on technical business development support.
- Pair SBDC with SCORE when the user also needs ongoing mentoring, operator judgment, or accountability.
- Use SBA for official program education and local resource-partner lookup.

## Important local note for 77084
The SBA local-assistance search for `type=26&zip=77084` shows Harris County local resources and four SBDC resource partners. Because 77084 is in the west Houston/Katy/Harris-area context and SBDC service areas can differ by exact business address/county, BOSS should verify the user's actual business county/service area before selecting a final SBDC office.
